caption: A man with short grey hair and glasses, wearing a dark suit jacket, a light blue button-down shirt, and a dark blue tie, speaks while standing behind a podium. The background consists of a light-colored wall featuring repeated logos of a stylized circular emblem and the text "INSTITUTE OF PEACE" and "UNITES". The man is looking down at papers on the podium in the beginning, then looks up toward the audience while gesturing slightly with his right hand. He has a small identification badge pinned to his left lapel. As the sequence progresses, his facial expression shifts from focused concentration to a neutral gaze forward. The camera remains stationary, keeping the man centered in a medium shot throughout the sequence.
